code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut result = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut has_token = false
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if has_token
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            result = result + v
          else if v < 0
            result = result - v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
        has_token = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has_token = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("r=#{result}")
end
